hook.text: Every sprint must produce an 'increment' — a working piece of software that could be released.

buildup.text: Each increment adds to all previous increments. The product grows with every sprint.

discovery.text: The increment must meet the Definition of Done — the team's quality standard.

twist.text: Many teams produce increments that aren't truly releasable — they call it done, but it isn't.

climax.text: A real increment means the team could ship at the end of any sprint. That's the power.

punchline.text: If you can't ship it, it's not done.

quiz.question: What must every Sprint increment be?
options: A working piece of software that could be released
A complete product with no bugs
